titleStmt.title: SII 7.372: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 372. (A.R. No. 168-F of 1901). ON A BROKEN SLAB LYING NEAR A WELL OPPOSITE THE OLD JAINA-BASTI.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē .
trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē [.] svastiśrī . jayābhyudaya śakavarurṣa 13
59 neya piṁgaḷasaṁvatsarada kārttika śudha 1 bu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara Ā rirā
yavibhāḍa pūrvapaścimadakṣiṇasamudrādhipati śrivīrapratāpa dēvarāyamahārāyaru vijaya nagari
ya(nagariya) rājyābhyudayadalū rāyana nirūpadiṁ śrīma(ṁ)nmahāpratāpa Aṁṇappavoḍeyaru bāra
kkūra rājyava nāḷuva kāladalū bārakkūra maṇigāṟakēriya voḷagaṇa sōmanāthadēvara saṁnidhiyali
paṭṭaṇabaḷiya purusaṇaseṭṭiyara maga hegaḍebaḷiya ciṁnavarada nāgaṁṇaseṭṭiyaru sōmanāthadēvara sa
ṁnidhiyali māḍidaṁthā dha(ṁ)rmaśāsanada paṭṭiya kramaveṁteṁdare maṇaŪraOḷage . maṇaŪ
radēvara mādhavamayyana makkaḷu kruṣṇanū nārāyaṇanū kriṣṇamayyana maga vāstēvamayya
nū koyakūra vāstēvamayyana maga kriṣṇamayyanū Oppi barada śilāsāsanada kramave
ṁteṁdare nāgaṁṇaseṭṭimayyakkaḷa kayyali mūlava koṁḍa bāḷu baḍaga tāra hiri
ya gadde jōgiya gaddeya catussīmeya vivara nāgaṁṇaseṭṭiyara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ
mū(ḍa)ḍalu Ūpādhyana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu Ayitāryara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu tu
ra na gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu yiṁtī catussīmeya Oḷage bittuva Āyidu mūḍeŪ
mūvattu hāne kaṁcinakeṟeya paḍuva gaddeya paḍuvalu mūvattaĀyidu hāne . kū
ṇigeṟeya paḍuvalu hadināṟu hāna sōmana kaṁda nārāyaṇamayya taṁna gaḍi
yiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu nālvattu hāne Ākkana gadde viṣṇumayyana gaḍiya paḍuvalu ha(ṁ)nnaraḍu hā
ne maneya bāgilu nārāyaṇamayya ta(ṁ)nna gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu ha(ṁ)nneraḍu hāne kaṁ
cinakeṟeya Ūpādhyara gaḍiya baḍagalu Aṟu hāne Aṁttu yēkatra bittuva bedegaṇagilu
nāgaṁḍugadalū yeṁṭu mūḍeŪ mūvattu hāne mane maneṭhāŪ bhāviya siṁnne sahavā
gi nāgaṁṇaseṭṭiyarū koṁḍa mūla mattaṁ nāgaṁṇaseṭṭiyara mūla maṇaŪroḷage A
va paḍuva bayaloḷage hāṭakēśanagaddeya catussīmeya vivara tōḍiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu kuṁ
daṁṇamayyana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu bijaṁṇaseṭṭi nāraṁṇamayyana Āruvārada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ
mūḍalu sōmadēvamayyana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catussīmeya Oḷage Āyivattu hāne
taḷikeṟeya gade haṁdeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu nārāyaṇamayyana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍu valu mu
koṁjaṇṇamayyana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu nāraṇamayyana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ
maneya bāgila gaddeya hannoṁdu hāne kūṇigeṟeya
kaṁcikeṟeyēḷu hāne Aṁtu yēkatra bittuva bede
mane maneṭhāU bāviya siṁne sahavā
vina kriṣṇahaṁdeya kayyalu
haṁdeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ
lu bittudu mū
This and the following lines are engraved on the other side of ṁḍu ya Oḷage Aṁpā kriṣṇamaga vāstē
nāgaṁṇa seṭṭiyarū koṁḍa mūlada bāḷina catussīme
ya vivara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu guṁmiseṭṭi kāmaṁ
na seṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍa(ḍa)galu paḍuvalu biramaseṭṭiyara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu
baḍagalu kriṣṇakāraṁte ṁṇa mayyakkaḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁka
lu yiṁtī catusīmeyoḷage bittudu mūvattu hāneyāṟu mūḍe Āṟu mūḍe gadde
seṭṭiyaru koṁḍa mūla yi bāḷiṁge gēṇiya Akki mūḍe hadināṟu mūḍe teṟu
teṟuva dēvasvava kaḷaci yi bāḷiṁge teṟuva teṟu Ayidu bitu hāne madhyastana kāhiṁge yera
ḍu (ho)hoṁnu mattaṁ Uppalāra Oḷage Aṁbaṣe guṁjaya Oḷage gōviṁdaneyyapanadēvana
taṁma kiṣṇaneyyapanadēvana kaṁnya bā mūḍalu tevaru yēkatravāgi
nāgaṁṇaseṭṭiyarū koṁḍa mūlada bāḷina catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu
teṁkaṇa beṭṭina baha ba Ā gaddeya catussīmeya vivara
mūḍalu koṁgi bāhiriya gaḍi vaṁdana gaḍi mada beṁdana gaḍi yi mūvara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ pa
ḍuva manayiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu neya nairitya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mū
ḍalu baḍagalu hoḷeyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catussīmeya Oḷaga
bedegaṇagilu nāgaṁḍugadalū catussīmeya vivara
completely damaged
gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu pari
mūḍalu baḍagalu neyya paḷḷiya mūlada makiya
catussīmeya Oḷaguḷa makiya bāgilagadde bittuva bedegaṇa
gilu mūḍe gadde yi bāḷiṁge gēṇiya Akki ma
kki mana manaṭhāU Uḍupinadēvarige teṟuva dēvasvada bhatta Ayi
naḍeva kuḷāgradali Arasige teṟuva teṟu
teṟuva teṟu maneṭhāU Ū sahavāgi madhyastanāda
yera sādhāraṇa saṁvatsarada
svāmiya baḷiya
seṭṭiyara kayyalu
mutilated And damaged
Digital edition of SII 7.372 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
